title: Airess Trilogy 3 Escaping Lavender Air Freshener Refill, 20ml, 90 Days Freshness
features: LONG-LASTING FRESHNESS: Provides up to 90 days of continuous lavender fragrance, keeping your space pleasantly scented for extended periods
REFILL COMPATIBILITY: Triple-chamber refill cartridge designed for Airess Trilogy air freshener systems with 20ml liquid capacity
CONVENIENT DESIGN: Easy-to-install refill system with liquid-sealed technology ensures leak-free operation and simple replacement
COMPACT SIZE: Measures 8.5 cm in height, 8.0 cm in length, and 2.5 cm in width, fitting discreetly in your space
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for freshening various indoor spaces with its soothing lavender scent, no batteries required for operation
description: Transform your space with the Airess Trilogy escaping lavender air freshener refill, designed to provide up to 90 days of consistent fragrance. This innovative triple-chamber refill system contains 20ml of premium lavender-scented fragrance that gradually releases a soothing aroma throughout your environment. The refill cartridge features a secure, double-sealed design to prevent leaks whilst ensuring optimal fragrance distribution. Perfect for homes, offices, or any indoor space requiring lasting freshness, this refill seamlessly integrates with compatible Airess Trilogy devices. The compact dimensions of 8.0 x 2.5 x 8.5 centimetres make it ideal for discrete placement. Each chamber contains carefully formulated fragrance that creates a layered, sophisticated scent experience. The refill is easy to install and requires no batteries, offering a hassle-free solution to maintain a consistently fresh atmosphere. Experience the calming essence of lavender with this long-lasting air freshening solution.
